zh.lifeSummary: 當Ethelind zur Lippe於1200年出生在費爾斯騰圖姆 利普時，她的父親Hermann II. zur Lippe25歲，母親Oda von Tecklenburg26歲。她於1237年與Adolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenberg結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1273年享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ethelind zur Lippe于1200年出生在費爾斯騰圖姆 利普时，她的父亲Hermann II. zur Lippe25岁，母亲Oda von Tecklenburg26岁。她于1237年与Adolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenberg结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1273年享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: zur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ofer, Yael, Amikam, Amram, Ari, Uri.
Jewish (Israeli): artificial name from Hebrew tsur ‘rock’. In some cases it may also be a translation of some original Ashkenazic surname with similar meaning (e.g. Fels or Stein ).
Polish (Żur): nickname from żur ‘sour soup’ (see Zurek ). Compare Schur .

variants.name: Fels
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Kurt, Sieglinde, Wolfgang.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near high ground or by a prominent crag, from Middle High German vels ‘rock, cliff’.

nameMeanings.name: Lippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the duchy of Lippe, which became an independent state in the 12th century.
German: topographic name for someone living on the banks of the Lippe river in Westphalia.

variants.name: Lipp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Frieda, Hans, Wendelin, Franz, Konrad, Otto, Rainer, Ralf.
English: nickname from Middle English lippe ‘lip’ (Old English lippa).
English: from the Middle English personal name Leppe, Lippe (pet forms of one or more Old English names containing Lēof- ‘dear, beloved’ as the first element). Compare Lewin 1.

nameMeanings.name: Ethelind
meanings: A female name which appears to be of modern origin. Miss Yonge compares it with the names Adelinde and Odelind, and translates it ' noble snake.' But the name means rather noble and mild; this is confirmed by Meidinger, who under lind, mild, soft, gentle, among several male and female names gives the female name Ethelinde. Compare also the Francic name Adelind.

en.lifeSummary: When Ethelind zur Lippe was born in 1200, in Lippe, her father, Hermann II. zur Lippe, was 25 and her mother, Oda von Tecklenburg, was 26. She married Adolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenberg in 1237. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1273, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ethelind zur Lippe est née en 1200, à Fürstentum Lippe, son père, Hermann II. zur Lippe, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Oda von Tecklenburg, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Adolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenberg en 1237. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1273, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ethelind zur Lippe 1200 in Fürstentum Lippe geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hermann II. zur Lippe 25 und ihre Mutter Oda von Tecklenburg 26. Sie hat 1237 Adolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1273 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ethelind zur Lippe è nata il nel 1200 nel Fürstentum Lippe, sua padre, Hermann II. zur Lippe, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Oda von Tecklenburg, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Adolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenberg nel 1237. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1273, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ethelind zur Lippeが1200年にフuルステントゥム リップで生まれた時，父Hermann II. zur Lippeは25歳，母Oda von Tecklenburgは26歳であった。1237年にAdolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1273年に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ethelind zur Lippe(이)가 1200년 프u르스투 리프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hermann II. zur Lippe(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Oda von Tecklenburg(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1237년 Adolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1273년 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ethelind zur Lippe nasceu em 1200, em Fürstentum Lippe, seu pai, Hermann II. zur Lippe, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Oda von Tecklenburg, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Adolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenberg em 1237. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1273, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ethelind zur Lippe родилась в 1200 г. в местности фuрстентум липп, её отцу по имени Hermann II. zur Lippe было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Oda von Tecklenburg, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenberg в 1237 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1273 г. в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ethelind zur Lippe nació en 1200, en Fürstentum Lippe, su papá, Hermann II. zur Lippe, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Oda von Tecklenburg, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Adolf l. Graf von Waldeck und Schwalenberg en 1237. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1273, a la edad de 73 años.
